title: Trump Breaks With Meloni, Italy’s Leader, Amid Dispute Over Pope and Iran
summary_full: Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni was once considered one of President Trump’s closest European allies. Their friendship now appears in danger.
summary_public: Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni was once considered one of President Trump’s closest European allies. Their friendship now appears in danger.
